targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '1h'), sum(total_count) as "Total" FROM traffic_records WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(recorded_at, '1m') AS "time", sum(motorbike_count) as "Motorbike", sum(car_count) as "Car", sum(truck_count) as "Truck", sum(bus_count) as "Bus" FROM traffic_records WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
